global_context.scene_description: A dramatic, cinematic advertising photograph of a black office paper shredder actively destroying a white HVAC contractor invoice. The paper is halfway into the shredder, with the top half still visible showing printed text reading 'HVAC QUOTE' as a header, with itemized line items below including 'Premium Installation Fee - $4,500', 'System Markup - $3,200', 'Sales Commission - $1,800', and a circled total of '$14,500+' in red ink. Each line item has an aggressive red 'X' drawn through it in red marker. Red crossed-out dollar sign icons float in the air around the shredder, scattered at various angles. Below the shredder, shredded paper strips and confetti-like pieces are exploding outward dramatically, caught mid-air with motion blur. The scene is set against a very dark, nearly black background with subtle dark gray gradient, with dramatic rim lighting hitting the edges of the shredder and the paper from behind and to the sides, creating a moody, high-contrast commercial look. The overall mood is aggressive and satisfying — the overpriced quote is being destroyed.

lighting.source: Artificial studio lighting, two rim lights from behind/sides
lighting.direction: Backlit and side-lit, creating rim lighting on shredder edges
lighting.quality: Hard, dramatic, commercial product photography style
lighting.color_temp: Cool neutral with slight warm highlights on paper

composition.camera_angle: Slightly low angle looking up at the shredder, making it feel powerful
composition.framing: Medium shot, shredder fills center of frame, paper and debris spread across full width
composition.depth_of_field: Medium — shredder and paper sharp, background falls to soft dark
composition.focal_point: The invoice being destroyed, specifically the red-marked line items and $14,500 total

semantic_relationships: Invoice is being fed into the shredder from above
Shredded debris is exploding out below the shredder
Red X marks on the invoice line items indicate they are being rejected/destroyed
Floating dollar sign icons with X marks surround the scene reinforcing the 'killing overpriced quotes' theme
Dramatic rim lighting creates separation between the shredder/paper and the dark background
The camera angle looking slightly up makes the shredder feel powerful and satisfying
